SubspaceProjection

Contents

  • SubspaceProjection
    • SubspaceProjection.fit()
    • SubspaceProjection.basis
    • SubspaceProjection.forward()
    • SubspaceProjection.adjoint()

SubspaceProjection#

class pygrog.gadgets.SubspaceProjection(n_components)[source]#

Bases: object

Low-rank temporal subspace projection via truncated SVD.

Given multi-frame data (n_frames, *spatial), projects onto the leading n_components left singular vectors.

Parameters:

n_components (int) – Number of subspace components to retain.

Methods

__init__

adjoint

Expand subspace coefficients back to frame domain.

fit

Compute temporal basis from calibration data.

forward

Project multi-frame data onto subspace.

Attributes

basis

Temporal basis matrix of shape (n_components, n_frames).
fit(calib_data)[source]#

Compute temporal basis from calibration data.

Parameters:

calib_data (torch.Tensor) – Calibration time-series of shape (n_frames, n_spatial).

Returns:

Self, with fitted basis.

Return type:

SubspaceProjection

property basis: Tensor#

Temporal basis matrix of shape (n_components, n_frames).

forward(data)[source]#

Project multi-frame data onto subspace.

Parameters:

data (torch.Tensor) – Shape (n_frames, *spatial).

Returns:

Shape (n_components, *spatial).

Return type:

torch.Tensor

adjoint(coefficients)[source]#

Expand subspace coefficients back to frame domain.

Parameters:

coefficients (torch.Tensor) – Shape (n_components, *spatial).

Returns:

Shape (n_frames, *spatial).

Return type:

torch.Tensor

previous

SparseFFT

next

SubspaceSparseFFT
